final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: needs a refined, editorial brand-standards aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a primary color swatches section, secondary/accent color swatches section, and typography specimen section, laid out as a formal brand guideline page
Subject: must include:
  Brand identity: 染秋 (RAN QIU) — autumn fragrance brand
  Color system: primary palette + supporting palette derived from autumn botanicals (桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶) and Eastern spices (肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀)
  Core fragrance lines: 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
  Typography: Chinese + Latin font pairing specimen showing brand name 染秋 and RAN QIU
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic, meditative atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a palette rooted in deep autumnal warmth — think osmanthus amber, persimmon orange, maple red-brown, dark oolong, sandalwood beige, resin gold — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a surface quality evoking traditional 染 (dyeing) craft — subtle ink-wash or textile grain undertone — exact texture treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (primary Chinese wordmark), "RAN QIU" (Latin transliteration), "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色" (fragrance line labels), "主色" (primary colors section label), "辅色" (secondary colors section label), "字体规范" (typography section label)
Constraints: must preserve all three fragrance line names verbatim; layout must read as a professional brand color + typography spec sheet with clearly delineated sections
Avoid: overly Western minimalist cold palette; neon or synthetic colors unrelated to autumn botanicals
